case_title: DEEPAK DULLABH ET AL VS. LAUREN E. MENSCHEL ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-27-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-27-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. THE TWO PLAINTIFFS WERE PRESENT. THE TWO DEFENDANTS WERE PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT VANCE JACOBS WAIVES PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT'S WITNESS ROY LEGGITT SWORN AND EXAMINED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DULLABH, DEEPAK DULLABH, BHIKHIBEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MENSCHEL, LAUREN E. JACOBS, VANCE P. PURSUANT TO CCP 116.610 - THE PREVAILING PARTY IS ENTITLED TO THE COSTS OF THE ACTION, INCLUDING THE COSTS OF SERVING THE ORDER FOR THE APPEARANCE OF THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,075.00 FILED BY DULLABH, DEEPAK DULLABH, BHIKHIBEN AS TO DEFENDANT MENSCHEL, LAUREN E. JACOBS, VANCE P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DULLABH, DEEPAK DULLABH, BHIKHIBEN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE: $40.00 SERVED FEB-25-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MENSCHEL, LAUREN E.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2015 - JUDGMENT.
